retrieval_system.retrieval: hybrid RRF recall with BM25 plus vector recall, reranking, and adjacent chunk expansion
retrieval_system.embedding_note: auto uses qwen3-embedding-0.6b through an OpenAI-compatible /embeddings endpoint, then cached local all-MiniLM-L6-v2 ONNX, then hashed fallback
retrieval_system.vector_backend_note: auto uses sqlite-vec when installed and deterministic in-memory cosine search otherwise
retrieval_system.title_term_guard: query terms that occur in chunk titles are removed before scoring
retrieval_system.direct_support_gate: name-of target terms must be present in retrieved evidence before answering
retrieval_system.tie_break: same-score chunks choose the earliest chunk position
